description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a test stage and a deploy stage and a variable GECKODRIVER_VERSION set to 0.23.0. In the test stage add a test-centos7 job that uses the centos:7 Docker image, runs a before_script that installs epel-release, installs firefox, gcc, gcc-c++, git, lua-devel, luajit, luajit-devel, luarocks, m4, make, openssl-devel, ruby, downloads geckodriver version ${GECKODRIVER_VERSION}, extracts it to /usr/local/bin, makes it executable, extracts the VERSION from web-driver.lua, copies and builds the corresponding rockspec with luarocks, removes source files, and installs luaunit; then runs luajit test/run-test.lua -v, luajit examples/get-text-of-element.lua, and luajit examples/crawl.lua https://lua-web-driver.gitlab.io/lua-web-driver/. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the ruby:2.5 image, runs a before_script that changes directory to docs, installs bundler via gem, runs bundle install, then builds the site with bundle exec jekyll build -d ../public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
